title: Get Alarms
description: Retrieves the alarms enabled for a specific device. This endpoint is supported for trackers that support alarms.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: tracker-id
parameters.description: The ID of the tracker for which the data is returned. The tracker-id can be found by using the Get Devices endpoint.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : alarmId
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the alarm ID.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : deleted
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm has been deleted. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : enabled
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm is enabled. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : recurring
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm is recurring. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : snoozeCount
response_fields.description: Indicates the number of times the alarm will snooze.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : snoozeLength
response_fields.description: Indicates the time in minutes between snooze periods.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : time
response_fields.description: The time and UTC offset for the specified alarm.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : vibe
response_fields.description: Returns the type of vibration configured. Supported : DEFAULT

response_fields.name: trackerAlarms : weekDays
response_fields.description: Returns the recurring days of the week which the alarm is set. Supported : MONDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY | THURSDAY | FRIDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY
